notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist. 2026-05-08 human approval: asset cleared for integration; runtime integration not yet performed.
final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: boss portrait set for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate boss portrait sheet with three distinct boss portraits for a fantasy match-3 roguelike. Subject: three bust portraits in a horizontal sheet: Iron Gate massive shielded stone/iron guardian, Burning Knight flame-armored boss, Prism Warden crystal-and-light arcane boss. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game portrait art, premium dark fantasy, high threat, crisp silhouette. Composition/framing: 3 portrait cells, consistent scale and angle, simple dark neutral backdrop, no labels. Lighting/mood: imposing boss reveal, dramatic rim light, not horror. Color palette: iron gray/gold, fire orange/red, prism cyan/violet/white highlights. Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no copyrighted characters, no casino imagery, each boss must be visually distinct.
